Patch Set 3:

Oops, I forgot to ask for reviewers ... And during the past weeks, we have discovered recent bugs within DKMS itself that now force us to require a newer version of DKMS including fixes. So the "dkms >= 2.2.0.3-18" comment+Require in this patch is obsolete, but hopefully this will fixed with Minh's back-port of Gerrit change #12296 fro b_ieel2_0.

parents.subject: LU-7205 osp: prohibit multi inflight RPCs for same object

commit.subject: LU-5465 build: strengthen Lustre DKMS RPM install
commit.message:
LU-5465 build: strengthen Lustre DKMS RPM install

This patch adds more control in Lustre DKMS RPM to take care that
its further install+build will not conflict with legacy lustre-osd
and lustre-modules RPMs already installed.

Signed-off-by: Bruno Faccini <bruno.faccini@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ie35e96326811f239d614aea19ae179b73c5961f3
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/11776
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Nathaniel Clark <nathaniel.l.clark@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
